name: Bourbon-Marinated Smoked Salmon
recipeIngredient: 1 1/2 pounds fresh salmon, skinned and boned
recipeInstructions:
1. Place the salmon in a large shallow dish.
2. Cover with vegetable oil.
3. Mix all other ingredients together to make marinade.
4. Marinate for 6 hours or overnight.
5. Grill over mesquite until flaky.
